### Optimizer

>  Optimizer (model:budget_optimizer.utils.model_classes.BaseBudgetModel,
>                 config_path:str|pathlib.Path)

*Optimizer wrapper for the pyswarms package*

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>model</td>
<td>BaseBudgetModel</td>
<td>The model to optimize</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config_path</td>
<td>str | pathlib.Path</td>
<td>Path to the configuration files</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

``` python
class BudgetModel(BaseBudgetModel):
    """
    Budget model class
    """
    ...
```

``` python
m = BudgetModel("Revenue Model", "Revenue", "../example_files/model_1")
```

``` python
init_budget = np.array([2, 3])
bounds = [(1, 3), (2, 4)]
constraints = opt.LinearConstraint([[1, 1]], [5], [5])
o = Optimizer(m, "../example_files")
```

>                          bounds:list[tuple[float,float]], constraints:None|sci

*Optimize the model*
